00030 #ifndef _KERN_TIME_H_
00031 #define _KERN_TIME_H_
00032 
00033 /*
00034  * Time-related definitions, for <sys/time.h> and others.
00035  */
00036 
00037 
00038 /*
00039  * Time with fractional seconds. Important. Unfortunately, to be
00040  * compatible, we need both timeval and timespec.
00041  */
00042 
00043 struct timeval {
00044         __time_t tv_sec;        /* seconds */
00045         __i32 tv_usec;          /* microseconds */
00046 };
00047 
00048 struct timespec {
00049         __time_t tv_sec;        /* seconds */
00050         __i32 tv_nsec;          /* nanoseconds */
00051 };
00052 
00053 
00054 /*
00055  * Bits for interval timers. Obscure and not really that important.
00056  */
00057 
00058 /* codes for the various timers */
00059 #define ITIMER_REAL     0       /* Real (wall-clock) time. */
00060 #define ITIMER_VIRTUAL  1       /* Virtual (when process is executing) time. */
00061 #define ITIMER_PROF     2       /* For execution profiling. */
00062 
00063 /* structure for setitimer/getitimer */
00064 struct itimerval {
00065         struct timeval it_interval;     /* Time to reload after expiry. */
00066         struct timeval it_value;        /* Time to count. */
00067 };
00068 
00069 
00070 #endif /* _KERN_TIME_H_ */
